title: pelargonium × imperiale
intro: Pelargonium × imperiale, commonly known as Imperial Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, specifically a cross between Pelargonium odoratissimum and Pelargonium tomentosum. The leaves of this plant contain rosmarinic acid, which is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × imperiale include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of this plant often come in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
